title: Sealapack SNACK BAGS, READY TO USE RESEALABLE BAGS, PACK OF 70, Clear, 16.5cm x 8.3cm
features: REDUCE TEMPTATION: Once opened, large bags of sweets, crisps and other snacks are hard to resist. Sealapack Snack Bags are pefect portion sized bags, simply add your favourite treat and seal. Each bag is resealable
LUNCH SNACKS: Each bag is the perfect size for added a tasty snack into a child's lunchbox. Keep a filled snack bag with you for a treat on the go

OUTDOOR ACTIVITY: Ensure you always have a boost to hand when walking, hiking or cycling. Reduce weight in a rucksack, add to cycle top pocket or a jacket pocket when out walking, try a fruit snack or mixed nuts and raisin mix

VERSATILE: Compact bag size perfect to store spare buttons, needle packets, open bags of screws or save fixings from dismantled units. Pop pet treats in the bag to put in your pocket or car storage area.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 70 RESEALABLE BAGS
